transcript:
HCP: hi, can you tell me what brought you in today
Patient: yeah, mostly just the panic attacks
HCP: tell me about the last one
Patient: it happened at the supermarket, my heart started pounding and i couldn't breathe
HCP: and did you feel like you were going to die
Patient: absolutely, i thought i was having a heart attack
HCP: how long did it last for
Patient: maybe five minutes, then i just sat down and it stopped
HCP: you seem quite agitated right now, is that how you feel
Patient: yeah, i can't sit still, i'm constantly checking my phone
HCP: do you feel that anxiety is affecting your daily life
Patient: yes, i've stopped going to work and avoiding the shops

behaviour.evidence_span: i can't sit still, i'm constantly checking my phone

thought.evidence_span: i thought i was having a heart attack
